evals.prompt: Run a security audit on the src/api folder. Find all vulnerabilities.
evals.expected_output: Multi-pass audit report with findings from each pass
expectations: Pass 1 applies standard security checks (OWASP, etc)
Pass 2 analyzes patterns in Pass 1 failures
Pass 3 targets specific vulnerability types found
Final report shows progress percentages per pass

evals.prompt: Do a thorough code quality review of this React component. I want to make sure nothing is missed.
evals.expected_output: Iterative audit with multiple passes catching different issue types
expectations: First pass catches obvious issues (lint, types)
Second pass finds patterns (repeated code, complexity)
Report tracks what was fixed vs acknowledged
